description_long: This is a weathered, wall-mounted air conditioner unit with a rectangular metal body, showing significant rust and grime along its edges and seams. The front features a large, circular fan protected by a metal grille, and a prominent graffiti tag in yellow and blue. The sides and back display electrical wiring and mounting brackets, with visible rust and corrosion, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The rear has a set of horizontal louvered vents for exhaust, while the side includes a small access panel and more wiring. The unit is elevated on a sturdy, rusted metal bracket, designed to keep it off the ground and attached to a vertical surface. The overall appearance suggests it is a robust, utilitarian appliance commonly found in urban environments.
description: A rusted, wall-mounted air conditioner with a large front fan, graffiti, and visible wiring, mounted on a metal bracket. The unit features louvered rear vents and a weathered, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large circular fan behind a grille, graffiti tag, and rust along the top and bottom edges.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a small access panel, electrical wiring, and the rusted mounting bracket extending from the base.
description_view_2: Rear view with horizontal louvered vents, extensive rust, and visible electrical cables looping across the surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the full height of the louvered exhaust vents and rusted corners.
attribute_brand_logo: none; graffiti tag in yellow and blue on the front left side, but no brand logo visible.
attribute_grille_pattern: Front grille is circular with radial spokes protecting the fan; rear grille consists of horizontal slats evenly spaced for exhaust airflow.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Single large rear exhaust vent with horizontal louvered slats spanning the full height of the unit.
